summary: Verified scent migration changes (LLM analyzes ONLY visible products). Backend status endpoint returns db_stats.total_visible (NOT total_products), start endpoint requires admin auth, and Admin Panel scent tab displays 'Видими продукти' value 7347 (with_profiles=1118, 15.2%). Backend tests: 5 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend UI verified end-to-end via Playwright.

issues: Tab label is 'scentAnalysis' (raw English camelCase, no icon spacing) instead of expected 'Аромати' per review_request. Inconsistent with the surrounding Bulgarian-localised tabs (Product, Orders, Collections, Homepage, Discounts also stay English but at least are real words). Likely an untranslated i18n key. Not blocking - the panel contents and stats are fully in Bulgarian and correct.

action_items: (LOW) Rename admin tab label from 'scentAnalysis' to 'Аромати' (or 'Анализ на аромати') for i18n consistency. Likely in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPanel.jsx or wherever the tabs array is defined.
critical_code_review_comments: scent_migration.py correctly applies is_visible: True filter both in run_migration_task query (line 124-132) and in status counts (lines 186-190). Math is consistent: with_profiles is limited to visible products and percentage divides by total_visible.
Status response uses 'total_visible' key and excludes 'total_products' - matches frontend expectation (ScentMigrationManager.jsx line 105 reads status.db_stats?.total_visible).
ScentMigrationManager.jsx info-text correctly states 'видимите продукти ... Скритите продукти се пропускат' - matches new behavior.
Auth on /start and /stop uses get_current_user from routes.auth and enforces role == 'admin' - returns 403 properly.
Migration state is module-level in-memory dict - not safe across multiple workers. Acceptable for single-worker admin tool but worth noting.

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 executed tests pass, 1 skipped because test user creds rejected - non-blocking)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - all expected labels and values render correctly on the scent analysis admin tab

test_credentials: Admin: konstantin.kirchev.bs@gmail.com / aS1zX2QwE34xK9 (works on /auth via POST /api/auth/login). Token returned in JSON body and used as Bearer.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 7347 visible products in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 review_request items are verified PASS: (1) GET /api/admin/scent-migration/status returns db_stats.total_visible=7347 (no total_products field), (2) POST /api/admin/scent-migration/start requires admin auth and successfully launches background task (returns {status:'running'}), (3) Admin panel last tab shows 'Видими продукти: 7347', 'С профили: 1118', 'Процент: 15.2%' and info-text explicitly says hidden products are skipped. Only nit: tab label is 'scentAnalysis' instead of Bulgarian 'Аромати'. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_scent_migration.py can be reused.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - this was a verification iteration. All requested changes (is_visible filter in migration query, total_visible in status, Видими продукти in UI) are correctly implemented and live.
